raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a {$6000.00} charge with XXXX XXXX for car stereo equipment and installation that I never received. The merchant failed to perform on time. After the merchant failed to perform installation due to multiple appointments missed by the merchant, I canceled with the merchant, and they have never responded to me regarding multiple requests for refund. 

Also, after my Attorney and I made many attempts to contact the merchant, my attorney and I have never received any phone calls or email responses from the merchant since the purchase made on XX/XX/year> and multiple phone calls and emails sent through XXXX XXXX The Dispute was resolved in the merchants favor because the merchant has a no refund policy. 

However, I provided the credit card disputes department a letter from my attorney. The letter states the merchant failed to perform because he did not have the necessary equipment at time of installation and his actions constitute a material breach of contract under XXXX  civil code XXXX. 

This should supersede the merchant no refund policy as he has been unfair and deceptive in this transaction. 

Also, I have made numerous calls to Barclays dispute department. On XX/XX/year> I made XXXX phone calls and while speaking to representatives the calls have dropped. This also happened in the past when calling their dispute department that they often advise me their computer is not working properly and they cant pull up the information. 

Also, Barclays refers me to their online website to get updates on my dispute. The online portal only has a letter document that was sent in XXXX, only indicating that dispute was opened. 

When I called them, I was advised that the merchant responded in writing. I asked them for this documentation, and they were unable or unwilling to provide it to me.
